per_question.expected_preview: The has_conflict flag is set to true (line 1629 in buffer.rs). When this flag is true, the buffer is
per_question.answer_preview: When buffer reload detects concurrent edits (file changed on disk while buffer has unsaved changes), the has_conflict flag is set to true. This prevents automatic reload which would lose user's work.
